factors: If he removed rock on the path to the apple, it was enabling the farmer to get it since he was assisting. If he did nothing, and left the rock there, and the farmer stepped that way but couldn't get the apple, then the wizard was forcing him to get the banana. If he took put the rock there but the farmer was going for the banana anyway, then it made no difference what he did on the apple end. If he did nothing and there wasn't a rock, then he isn't enabling (assisting), but rather allowing since he has the power to throw up a rock if he wanted.
